name: Export Patterns
summary: Common export configurations and their use cases: playtest builds, milestone releases, full production.

definitions.meaning: Quick build for narration dry-run or internal review. Minimal formats, English only, no art/audio, fast turnaround.
examples: term_usage: Testing narrative flow before full production | context: output_formats: [markdown, html], include_art_plans: false, include_art_renders: false, include_audio_plans: false, include_audio_assets: false, languages: [en], print_friendly: true

definitions.meaning: Chapter or act completion for stakeholder review. Reader-friendly formats, art/audio plans included for context, still primary language only.
examples: term_usage: Sharing completed chapter with reviewers | context: output_formats: [markdown, html, epub], include_art_plans: true, include_art_renders: false, include_audio_plans: true, include_audio_assets: false, languages: [en], print_friendly: true

definitions.meaning: Release-ready bundle for distribution. All formats including PDF, full renders and assets, all supported languages, print-ready layout.
distinguishing_features: Art/audio: full renders and assets, plans excluded
examples: term_usage: Final release to players | context: output_formats: [markdown, html, epub, pdf], include_art_plans: false, include_art_renders: true, include_audio_plans: false, include_audio_assets: true, languages: [en, nl, de], print_friendly: true

definitions.meaning: Review translation coverage before release. Side-by-side language comparison, text-focused, coverage flags visible.
examples: term_usage: Reviewing Dutch translation coverage | context: output_formats: [markdown, html], include_art_plans: false, include_art_renders: false, include_audio_plans: false, include_audio_assets: false, languages: [en, nl], print_friendly: false

heuristics.context: When asked for a quick internal review
heuristics.guidance: Use playtest build pattern: MD+HTML, English only, no assets, print-friendly.
examples: situation: Showrunner wants to review narrative flow | response: Playtest build configuration

heuristics.guidance: Use milestone release pattern: MD+HTML+EPUB, English only, art/audio plans included, no renders.
examples: situation: Chapter 3 complete, need stakeholder review | response: Milestone release configuration

heuristics.guidance: Use full production pattern: all formats including PDF, all languages, full renders and assets, print-ready.
examples: situation: Ready to ship to players | response: Full production configuration

heuristics.guidance: Use translation review pattern: MD+HTML, source and target languages, no assets, coverage flags visible.
examples: situation: Need to verify Dutch translation coverage | response: Translation review configuration with [en, nl]

heuristics.context: Choosing between markdown, html, epub, pdf
heuristics.guidance: Markdown: source control, diffing. HTML: web reading, interactivity. EPUB: e-readers, mobile. PDF: print, archival. Consider target audience and distribution method.

warnings.consequence: Slow build times, unnecessary processing, delays internal review
warnings.prevention: Playtest builds should exclude all art renders and audio assets

warnings.consequence: Incomplete release, non-English players cannot access content
warnings.prevention: Full production must include all supported and sufficiently-covered languages

warnings.consequence: Players see meta-planning content instead of finished assets
warnings.prevention: Full production should include renders/assets but exclude plans
